_comment: Local demo environment. Points the backend at a separate SQL Server database (DeliveryChallanDemo) so customer demos / training sessions don't dirty the real dev DB. On first start the backend auto-creates the database, applies every migration, then runs Data/DemoDataSeeder which lays down ~6 months of synthetic activity (one demo company, 8 clients, 5 suppliers, 25 item types, ~40 challans, ~25 bills, ~15 purchase bills). The seed runs once per database — a marker is written to AuditLogs so subsequent starts skip. Bring up with: scripts/run-demo.ps1 (binds to http://localhost:5135).

Jwt._comment: Demo-only JWT key. The string is local-only and never deployed to production — the prod environment loads its key from appsettings.Production.json (gitignored) or the Jwt__Key env var.
